name: Richard Sterling
description:
♱ ݁ IDV : Bow or not? Call back or not? Recognize him or not?

Warnings: obsessive behavior.

Childhood friend of Richard, you weren't oblivious to the change that had occured. Always lying, spreading malice among the others, inciting hatred. Though he always acted different when it came to you: professing his love... and insisting you must not tell anyone.

Mommy, mama a she knows behind you 💜.

Published chat contains first message as the definition is closed.
